expectations.text: Reports article count broken down by source (e.g. tldr_ai, tldr_tech, techcrunch, harper_carroll)
expectations.evidence: Table: techcrunch 18, tldr_tech 15, tldr_ai 8, tldr_dev 0, harper_carroll 0. Flagged: tldr_dev 0 (parser/fetch failure), harper_carroll 0 (investigate), all tldr_ai dropped by curator.

expectations.text: Reads summaries.json and identifies P0 priority summaries specifically
expectations.evidence: Explicitly reads P0 summaries: 'Amazon Health AI', 'Google Gemini Chrome', 'YouTube', 'Canopii indoor farms', 'WhatsApp parent-linked', 'Google acquires Wiz' — all 6 P0s listed.

expectations.text: Reports actual word count for at least one P0 summary
expectations.evidence: Word count table: Amazon Health AI 184, Google Gemini Chrome 207, YouTube 212, Canopii 222, WhatsApp 216, Google/Wiz 219.

expectations.text: Compares P0 word count against the 300-500 word target from DESIGN.md
expectations.evidence: Target column explicitly shows 300-500 for each row. Source: DESIGN.md cited.

expectations.text: Flags any P0 summary that falls outside the 300-500 word target range
expectations.evidence: All 6 P0 summaries marked FAIL. 'Systematic under-generation from summarizer.'

suggestions.reason: The with_skill agent also checked podcast_script.json quality (duration, hallucinations) beyond what the assertions required — good depth. Consider adding an assertion: 'Notes root cause for P0 word count failure (e.g. scraper not run → no full_text → summarizer had only snippets)'.

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect score. Efficient: only 5 tool calls. The skill template guided the agent to the exact 5 data points needed with zero wasted effort. Deeper analysis (script hallucinations, tldr_ai dropped) included as bonus.
